description: A premium, understated website template for solo consultants and advisors targeting executive clients.

questions.question: What is your main headline/tagline?
questions.placeholder: From Analytics Spend to Boardroom Evidence

questions.question: What is your subheadline? (One sentence describing who you help and the outcome)
questions.placeholder: I help banking and financial services leaders prove the commercial value of their data investments—so they can secure funding, scale what works, and stop what doesn't.

questions.placeholder: Chief Data Officers and senior data leaders in banking and financial services
